title: Procedure grid cards duplicate timestamp and duration indicators
description:
ProcedureTask grid cards currently render timestamp and elapsed duration twice.

Behavior spec:
Feature: Procedure grid task indicators
Scenario: A procedure appears in grid mode
Given a procedure card is rendered in grid mode
When the card shows its run indicators
Then it shows the dispatch indicator, timestamp, and duration once each
And it preserves the order: dispatch indicator, timestamp, duration.

Definition of Done:
- Grid cards render no duplicate timestamp or duration indicator.
- Detail mode is unchanged.
- Focused ProcedureTask test covers the no-duplication behavior.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation. Confirmed duplication is in dashboard/components/ProcedureTask.tsx: grid header renders DispatchIndicator/Timestamp/ProgressBarTiming, and grid content repeats Timestamp/ProgressBarTiming. Plan is to keep the header sequence and remove only the repeated grid-content timing rows, then add focused Jest coverage.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented the UI fix and regression coverage. Removed the duplicate grid-content Timestamp/ProgressBarTiming rows while keeping the header order as dispatch indicator, timestamp, duration. Verification: npm test -- ProcedureTask.optimizer-auth.test.tsx passed; npm run typecheck passed; npm run build:fast passed. npm run lint is blocked by existing dashboard lint script incompatibility: next lint --no-cache exits with unknown option --no-cache.
